landing.title: CRM Software Solutions Company for Service Businesses | Copper CRM
landing.text:
CRM Software Solutions Company for Service Businesses | Copper CRM
Consent
Details
[#IABV2SETTINGS#]
About
This website uses cookies
We serve cookies on this site to analyze traffic, remember your preferences, and optimize your experience.
[#GPC_BANNER_ICON#]
[#GPC_TOAST_TEXT#]
Consent Selection
Necessary
Preferences
Statistics
Marketing
Show details
Details
Necessary
19
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Google
1
Learn more about this provider
Some of the data collected by this provider is for the purposes of personalization and measuring advertising effectiveness.
test_cookie
Used to check if the user's browser supports cookies.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 1 day
Type
: HTTP Cookie
LinkedIn
2
Learn more about this provider
bcookie
Used in order to detect spam and improve the website's security.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 1 year
Type
: HTTP Cookie
li_gc
Stores the user's cookie consent state for the current domain
Maximum Storage Duration
: 180 days
Type
: HTTP Cookie
eum.instana.io
1
in-session
This cookie is used to detect errors on the website - this information is sent to the website's support staff in order to optimize the visitor's experience on the website.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Persistent
Type
: HTML Local Storage
g2.com
g2crowd.com
go.copper.com
player.vimeo.com
4
__cf_bm [x4]
This cookie is used to distinguish between humans and bots. This is beneficial for the website, in order to make valid reports on the use of their website.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 1 day
Type
: HTTP Cookie
stories.nws.ai
1
amp-story-state
This cookie is used in conjunction with visual content. The cookie is necessary for the full-screen function; remembers whether the user has chosen the full-screen view.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Persistent
Type
: HTML Local Storage
vimeo.com
zoominfo.com
2

: Session

www.copper.com

www.copper.com
php.copper.com
6

Registers which server-cluster is serving the visitor. This is used in context with load balancing, in order to optimize user experience.

: Session

: HTTP Cookie
AWSALBTGCORS [x3]
Registers which server-cluster is serving the visitor. This is used in context with load balancing, in order to optimize user experience.

Preferences
9
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Intercom
4
Learn more about this provider
intercom-device-id-#
Sets a specific ID for the user which ensures the integrity of the website’s chat function.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 271 days
Type
: HTTP Cookie
intercom-id-#
Allows the website to recoqnise the visitor, in order to optimize the chat-box functionality.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 271 days
Type
: HTTP Cookie
intercom-session-#
Sets a specific ID for the user which ensures the integrity of the website’s chat function.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 7 days
Type
: HTTP Cookie
intercom.played-notifications
Used by the website to determine which support notifications the user has been shown.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Session
Type
: HTML Local Storage
LinkedIn
1
Learn more about this provider
lidc
Registers which server-cluster is serving the visitor. This is used in context with load balancing, in order to optimize user experience.
Maximum Storage Duration
: 1 day
Type
: HTTP Cookie
fast.wistia.net
www.copper.com
2
wistia-video-progress-# [x2]
Contains a timestamp for the website’s video-content. This allows the user to resume watching without having to start over, if the user leaves the video or website.
Maximum Storage Duration
: Persistent
Type
: HTML Local Storage
js.intercomcdn.com
www.copper.com
2

: 1 day
Type
: HTTP Cookie

Collects statistics on the visitor's visits to the website, such as the number of visits, average time spent on the website and what pages have been read.

Registers statistical data on users' behaviour on the website. Used for internal analytics by the website operator.

Collects statistics on the user's visits to the website, such as the number of visits, average time spent on the website and what pages have been read.

53
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

analysis.name: Copper
analysis.tagline: CRM Software Solutions Company for Service Businesses
analysis.value_proposition: A CRM built specifically for service businesses with deep Google Workspace integration to eliminate manual data entry.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to mid-size service businesses already using Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)

features.name: pipeline management
features.description: Visual sales pipeline to track deals and opportunities through stages

features.name: email sync
features.description: Bi-directional email sync and tracking within the CRM, with Gmail integration

features.name: workflow automation
features.description: Automated task triggers and workflow rules to reduce manual follow-up

features.name: web forms
features.description: Embeddable lead capture and data entry forms that push records into the CRM

features.name: reports and analytics
features.description: Built-in reporting dashboards covering pipeline, activity, and performance metrics

features.name: api access
features.description: REST API for custom integrations and data access

features.name: list management
features.description: Filtered list views for contacts, leads, companies, and opportunities

features.name: data import and export
features.description: Bulk import via CSV and export of CRM records

features.name: user management
features.description: Admin controls for adding, removing, and managing team members

features.name: role-based permissions
features.description: Settings and permissions controls scoped per user or role

features.name: playbooks
features.description: Guided sales process templates and step-by-step playbooks for reps

features.name: onboarding and training
features.description: Weekly live webinars and structured getting-started content for new users

features.name: google workspace integration
features.description: Native two-way sync with Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive; no manual data entry
features.evidence_quote: CRM Integration With Your Favorite Tools | Copper | Copper CRM

features.name: contact management
features.description: Centralized contact and company records auto-populated from email interactions

features.name: certified service partner network
features.description: Access to certified implementation and consulting partners

features.name: data privacy controls
features.description: GDPR and data privacy settings for managing customer data compliance

features.name: subscription and billing management
features.description: Self-serve plan upgrades, downgrades, and billing management

integrations: Google Workspace (Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive)
Intercom (confirmed via cookie/chat widget on site)
differentiators: Deep native Google Workspace integration — CRM data auto-captured from Gmail without manual entry
